title: Intricately Roasted French Monkfish Canele
description: A peppery and fluffy show-off French dish featuring monkfish, roasted to perfection in a canele form using an iron teppan, perfect for a flexitarian dinner
instructions: Preheat the iron teppan to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
Season the monkfish cubes with black pepper, garlic powder, paprika, and salt
Melt the butter in the iron teppan and add the seasoned monkfish cubes
Roast the monkfish for 5 minutes on each side, or until cooked through
Remove the monkfish from the iron teppan and set aside
Add the lemon juice, chicken broth, and heavy cream to the iron teppan
Scrape up any browned bits from the bottom of the iron teppan
Return the monkfish to the iron teppan and spoon some of the sauce over the top of each cube
Transfer the monkfish to a canele mold and garnish with chopped fresh parsley
